intro: Abbotia pumila, also known as Dwarf Abbotia, is a small, perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Africa, belonging to the family Urticaceae. The health benefits of Abbotia pumila include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema.
